item.title: SPIKE: TextKit 2 Keystroke Latency Validation
item.intent: Validate that TextKit 2 can achieve <16ms keystroke-to-render latency before committing to it as the text engine
item.description: Build a minimal TextKit 2 prototype with NSTextLayoutManager and NSTextContentStorage. Benchmark keystroke-to-render latency with attributed string updates per paragraph on iPhone 15 and iPhone SE (3rd gen). Measure with os_signpost. If TextKit 2 fails the <16ms target, document findings and evaluate TextKit 1 fallback. Blocks FEAT-039 (Text Engine). Updates architecture decision [A-004].
acceptanceCriteria: Minimal TextKit 2 prototype runs on iPhone 15 and iPhone SE
Keystroke-to-render latency measured via os_signpost for 100+ consecutive keystrokes
Results documented: p50, p95, p99 latency values
Architecture decision [A-004] updated based on findings
